titleStmt.title: SII 15.36: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 36. (B.K. No. 109 of 1926-27.) HOSŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the wall of the Śiva temple.

This is dated the 10th regnal year of the king, Prabhava, Pushya śu. 13, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1148 A.D., January 5. The Saṅkramaṇa, however, occurred on 1147 A.D., December 25, Thursday.

It registers the renewal of the gift of a betelnut garden for the worship of the god Mūlasthāna and for repairs, etc. made by Hollagāvuṇḍa of Hosavūr for the beatitude of his deceased father Nākigāvuṇḍa and senior uncle Boppagāvuṇḍa. Hollagāvuṇḍa belonged to the Sinda family and Kunnula race. The gift was received by the teacher Gaṅgēśvara-paṇḍita of the Pāśupata sect in the presence of the Seven Hundred. The record gives the genealogy of Hollagāvuṇḍa and describes the valour and meritorious deeds of his ancestors. It also refers to Sakaḷaprakāśa as administering the heggēri of Muḷugunda and also Hosavūr. Other gifts such as income derived from cess on betel leaves, etc., are also mentioned.

In the concluding portion which refers to the administration of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chāmuṇḍarasa bearing the epithet Toṇḍamaṇḍaḷika [śuṇḍāla] pañchānana, is recorded the gift of income from Pannāya to the god by his subordinate Pergaḍe Kalidēvanāyaka, the adhikāri of Bhaṇḍārada Basavamayya-nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīmaccaḷukyavaṁśalalāmaṁ sarvvajñacakravarttiya sutanuddā
mapratāpi vasudhādhāmaṁ jagadēkamallarāyaṁ nagardaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśva
ra paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakravartti jagadēvamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamā
namācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . ka . prakaṭiteyaśōnaṭīnar�kananavadhiguṇagaṇā nvitaṁ sakaḷakaḷādhikaneṁdu pogaḷadavarārssakaḷaṁ sakaḷaprakāśabaṭā rakaraṁ .
© svasti yamaniyamasyādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa maunānuṣṭhāna parāyaṇaruṁ tribhuvana mallavallabhasabhāprabhāvitapravādipracaṇḍarumappa tribhuvanamalla
dēvarārādhyarssakaḷaprakāśabhaṭṭārakarmmuḷuga nāda heggēriyumanā vīranārāyaṇa dēvara kuttuṁv®tti hosavūranāḷda� . v® . jaḷadhiv®tāvanīva
dhuge kuntaḷadaṁte virājisittu kuntaḷaviṣayaṁ tadurvvareyoḷu�vaḷedharmmanivāsabhūmi beḷvolamatasēvyamā janapadānanadaṁtevūleṁtu nōḷpaḍaṁ sale
muḷugunda hannera�moppuguvuttamabhōgabhūmivōl . © . svastyaśēṣadharātaḷā nanda si�kuḷava�kanda nandanavanavasantanuṁ . vīralakṣmīkāntanuṁ . bāvannavīrāgraga
ṇya ka�kuḷāṁbhōjamitraṁ . vairimanneyalatālavitraṁ . dhairyamaṁdaramahīdharaṁ muḷgu�davidyādharaṁ parivṛtavidagdhavibudhavrajaṁ . pannagamahādhvajaṁ .
koṟaluguṁṇḍānvayaṁ . prabaḷatējōmayaṁ . vidviṣṭaduṣṭakāḷiṁgagajabhīmaṁ . kāminī kāmaṁ . vīrarasabhōjanuṁ . vyāghralāṁchanaṁ . nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī
manmuḷugun�ṁ hanneṟaḍaramanneyaṁ bopparasar . kaṁ . rakṣisi dharmagaḷanupalakṣisi kunnu lana caratamaṁ rapujayadūḷakṣativettaṁ sale sinda kṣatriyanenipa boppanahi
tajhaḷappaṁ . Ā panneraḍaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ . v® . [I]re madhupāḷi poṁjaḍeya saurabhamaṁ taṇivannavīṁṭi bittaradoḷe nandanāḷigaḷoḷaṁpugaleṁbuvu pūtacūtadoḷ pa
rivṛta kōkiḷapratatiśāḷivanāḷige līleyiṁde pāydaragiḷi sāvadhāna posavūresaguṁ nirantaraṁ . hosavūrē cagavuṇḍanujvaḷayaśa śrīkāṁtanātaṁge puṇya
sati prauḍhe vinīte sītegeṇeyappaḷu kaṁcigāvuṇḍi rājisu daṁpatigaḷuga puṭṭida siṁgakke ryyanippasaviṁ boppagavuṇḍanaṁ jananuta śrī nāki gānaṇḍanu . Allinā
kigāvuṇḍana parākramamuṁ prabhutvamumeṁteṁdaḍe . © bandenena kāḷagada naḍevasa nettariṁdoṁdeḍe khaṇḍadiṇḍigega de bhūtapiśācakōṭiyiṁ doṁdeḍe birdda vī
rabhaṭareḷugaruḷūḷ toḍarddaśvarājiyidondeḍe nōḍaladbhutavenippudu nākiya gelda yuddhadoḷ . mūlasthāna viśāla śivālayamaṁ boppanoppiralu māḍisidaṁ kaiḷā
śōpama morakēśālayamaṁ nāki puṇyanidhi māḍisidaṁ . paḍeda dhanaṁ mṛḍapūjege mṛḍa pratiṣṭhege mṛḍāśrayapratatige takkeḍege tapōdhanarggittēṁ paḍedanō dhanamaṁ vivēki nā
kigāvuṇḍaṁ . Ā vibhuge bhōgiyakkaniḷāvadhugeṇeyenisi biṇpaniṁbadoḷire yiṁtī vidha saduguṇagaṇadiṁde tā vadhuviṁduvadana kūrppa kulavadhuvesedaḷ . Antavargge
puṭṭida viśrāṁtadoḷaṁ vibhavadoḷaṁ vudāradoḷaṁ cairantanareṇeyane seṇasuvarggaṁtakanenale sava putrakaṁ prabhu hollaṁ . pitṛdhanamaṁ tiṁdunmattateyeṁdirpparama puruṣa nallaṁ
dēvāyatanakke kerege śatrakke taṭākakkettudhanamanesavaṁ hollaṁ . paravanitākēkarabhīkara bāṇaṁ naḍeda śaucaguṇavidu lōkōttaravī hollagāvuṇḍana doreyāriterarpparāṁ ganāpu
trakanoḷ . v® . kāntada moggeraṁ harigeyoḍḍaṇavettida vājirāji māṟāṁtade kāḷarakkasa nivaṁ javaniṁtivanendarāti vibhrāṁtiyaneyde koluva galvudba(lvadbhu)ta vīranoḷuṁ
�rā vikrāṁta hollanoḷ ripuhṛdisthaḷasallanoḷājimallanoḷ . ka . Enisi hollagavuṇḍana manassarōvaramarāḷabāḷike tānaṁbinagaṁ kulavadhuvādaḷ ja
nōnuta cāvuṇḍigavuṇḍi vanitāratnaṁ . svasti samastasatyaśaucācāranayavinaya śīḷasaṁpannanuṁ . vibudhaprasannanuṁ . nijakuḷanaḷinīṣaṇḍamārttaṇḍanuṁ . prajemacce ga
ṇḍanuṁ . catussīmeya dharmmasaṁrakṣiṇaika dakṣamaṁ . nirvikārākāramanasija sa ddakṣanuṁ . paranadhūdārasmērakēkarāḷōkamārggaṇa gaṇātidūranuṁ . saṁsārasāranuṁ bha
yalōbharahitanuṁ . vasumatīmahitanuṁ . jayavadhūdhāmanuṁ . saṁgrāmabhīmanuṁ mūlasthāna mōrakēśvarādidēvāyatana viśā�śiḷāmayavitatakūṭakōṭi viṭaṁ
kanirmmāpaṇa ṣṭhanuṁ śivaliṁgapratiṣṭhāgariṣṭhanumappa śrīmannāḷprabhu hosavūra hollagāvuṇḍaṁ tannūranēkabhōgada gāvuṇḍikeyanāḷdanubhavisuttirddaṁ . va . Uṟadāṁtaṁgaṁtakaṁ
tānenisidadaṭanī mallagāvuṇḍanādaṁ kiṟiyayyaṁ bhuvanaviśrutaviśadayaśaṁ kāvagāvu ṇḍanu vaṭṭāgirddanaṁtirvvarumanupamaviśrāṁtakaunnatyadindaṁ naṟedirddī hollagāThe letter vu is engraved below the line.
vuṇḍana vijayabhujādaṇḍavirppaṁtirirddar . v® . takkudanīvarilla śivayōgige viprajanakke dēvasaṁ vāśrayakke śivapūjege śiṣṭajanakke sarvvadharmmakkanurāgadinde besakayva
mahōṁnati gaḷu nūdārakṛti makkaḷunnatikevettarivarśśivapādar . ka . dhare pogaḷalā śivadharmmada pāravariyoḷa puṇyabījamaṁ bitti niraṁtaramane beḷavi beḷasirikaravesede
ttēḷu nūrvvaruṁ kṛtakṛtyar . © puruhota bhavanamuṁ khēcarabhavanamuṁmidara pōlvigeydevene bandhura mūlasthānēśvara varabhavana śilāmayaṁ karaṁ raṁjisuguṁ . © kāḷēśa
vrati suvibhavabhavananirmmitekīrttivilōlanannadānasadāḷaṁbaṁ jñāna rāśiyatipati ye sadaṁ . tacchiṣyarmūlasthānadēvara sthānācāryyar . ka . kṣameyaṁ
kūrisi dārameya māḍi kāruṇyasudhā meyineṟagisidanatyu ttamanī gaṁgēśvarāryyanurvvīvinutaṁ . v® . bēḍavaṁ tāpasanandakkariganālēkhyaṁ naṭaṁ
gāyakaṁ nuḍikāṟa kavi paurāṇika paṇḍita yeṁdiṁtivargganna dāna dodavi gaṁgēśvarāryya jasaṁ baḍedaṁ pāśupataprasiddhatapamūlasthāna yōgī
śvaraṁ . svasti . śrīmaccāḷukyapratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvavarṣada 10 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha 13 sōmavāramumuttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa vya
tīpāta kūḍida puṇyatathiyoḷ śrīmannāḷprabhu hollagāvuṇḍaṁ tamma piriyayyaṁ boppagāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ tammayyaṁ mahāprabhu nākigāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ parōkṣavinayamā
gi taṁdeya dharmmamaṁ punarbbharaṇaṁ māḍi śrī mūlasthānadēvara kalvesakke māṭa kūṭa prasādādigaḷgamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍevantāgi tānuveḷunūrvvaruvirddu gaṁgēśvara
paṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi sarvvanamaśyamuṁ sarvvabādhāparihāramu māgi biṭṭaḍakadōṁṭa mōrakēśvaradēguladiṁ baḍagaleraḍu tōṁṭaṁgaḷiya kaṇi
ya baṭṭeyiṁ paḍavalūra mundaṇa pariva kārigeyiṁ mūḍaloṁde sthaḷaṁ tavarājada tōṁṭa vondu . kallabhāviya tōṁṭavondu . paṭṭavarddhanada tōṁṭavondu . Antu tōṁ
ṭeṁ 3 dēvarggaṁgabhōgakke sarvvanamasyamāgi kadaṁbakeyyiṁ baḍagalu biṭṭa kisu mattarāṟu . gurugaḷa bhikṣegendu gāvuṇḍageyyoḷage vāyavyadalu biṭṭa mattarūndu .
v® . biḍadārādhisi vittamaṁ vividhamōhavyūhadiṁdirppa tammaḍiya dharmmada permme nūrmmaḍiyenalu kaiḷāsakutkīḷadoḷ paḍiyaṁboṁdu viḷāsamaṁ taḷaya mūla
sthānamuttuṁgamaṁ dhareyalu māḍisidaṁ śilāmayamanīgaṁgēśayōgīśvaraṁ . tadgurudharmmaprabhōdhanayiṁ paṁkajanābhanābhipadmōdbhavavaṁśaja daṁḍanāyakaṁ suṁkada mē
dirājanadhikārigaḷī mahādēva dōvarā�ṁkanumiṁtu dēva paya nāraṇadēvanu meṁba nālvaru kiṁkararkkuḷiya suṁkada perggaḍegaḷu mahōnnatar . Antavarśrī
mūlasthānadēvara cayitrakkaṁ pavitrārōpaṇakkaṁ dēvara tōṁṭadeleyaḍakeya kuḷiya suṁkamaṁ sarvva namasyavāgi biṭṭar . ka . sādada perggaḍe dharmmavinōdaṁ dēvargge naḍava
gāṇada teṟeyaṁ sādaradoṁdīgaḷīdeṟeyādudanittaṁ śivaṁge mahādēvaṇnaṁ . pāśupatabrata niyamadoḷā sakaḷādriya lēsalla mahimōṁnatiyiṁdīśvaratanuvenalabhinava pāśu
pataṁ jēṣṭarāśi yatipatitiḷakaṁ . Ārādhitagurucaraṇarnnityadiṁ bhramararāgamānvitacarita rmmāramada bhaṁjanōṁnatarggāruṇya śrī jēṣṭarāśi yatipuṁgavaro
ḷ . v® . javanoḷu tāguvana janajalipa kāḷavyādhanaṁ pāyva bhairavanaṁ bhaikaripaṣṭadiggaja doḷāṁpudrēkadiṁ siṁgamaṁtivivēḷuṁ jaḷarāśiyaṁ kadupi niṁdāpōśanaṁgoḷuThe letter ḷ is written above the line.
vaneṁdavarārggaṇḍina toṇḍarappu gurumānūrvvarjjagadbhuṁbhukar . Intatipracaṁḍarappu gura mūnūrvvaruṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgakke dōṇiyaloṁdu paṇamaṁ koṭṭar . ka . ja
perggaḍevibhu dōvarasadēvargge nityapūjege koṭṭajaragaydokkala teṟeyaṁnirantara naḍegidippa śivapadabhaktaṁ . v® . saṇasuvavaṁge koṁḍiḍuvavaṁguradaṁge paraṁga saṁga
rāṁgaṇadoḷa tōruvarṇnosalaka suḷakudu kaṭṭisaṁdaṇisida ruṁḍa mālegaḷinaṭṭuta bhairavarūpaniṁtu balukaṇigaḷa dārogeya patākeya billamahā
bhaṭarkkaḷoḷ . paṇekaṭṭaṁ taleyāṁtu tāḷdi śaraṇeṁdātaṁge māṟāṁta rāvaṇanandaṁga vidirccuvarggirisaridviṁdhyāṭavīdēśabhūṣaṇaruddaṇḍavirōdhidarppadaḷanarssāmānyamē saṁ
garāṁgaṇadoḷ tāgi taruṁbalārppadaṭarārī billamūnūrvvaroḷ . ka . Aṇuvaṁ niṁbaṁ māraguṇayutanimeḷagenisi bennamabūvāgraṇigaḷa mūlasthāna triṇē
trabhavanaṁ nirantaraṁ beḷaguvinaṁ . naṁdādīvigegidutāneṁdu naḍevaṁdu dōṇisāsi rvvarumānandadoḷī būvarayvarumoṁdāgirddāḷoḷondu pāgamanittar . Intī dharmmamaṁ gāvuṁ
ṇḍanaṁveḷunūrvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvar . ka . kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumanavayavade suvarṇnadiṁdekaṭṭisi viprapravarargge koṭṭa phaḷavī śivadharmmōddharaṇarenipa puṇyajanaṁgaḷ . gaṁgāsā
gara yamunāsaṁgamadoḷ kōṭi kavileyaṁ brāhmaṇara liṁgigaḷaṁ sale puṇyadinaṁga ḷūḷaḷidavarggaḷappariṁtidanaḷidar . ślōka . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harē
tavasuṁdharāṁ saṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . © sūriliya mukhya paṇḍitara kavite . kallukeṟeya bammōjana kaṇḍaraṇe maṁgaḷa .
svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ maṁḍaḷikamārttaṁḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍaṁ nuḍidaṁtegaṁḍaṁ puḍemuṭṭida gaṁḍaṁ toṁḍamaṁḍa
ḷika śuṁḍāla paṁcānanaṁ sāhasōttuṁgaṁ bhujabalabhīmaṁ vīra cāvuṁḍarasaru sthiraṁ rājyaṁgayuttire tatpādapadmōpajīvi bhaṇḍārada basavamayyanāyakaradhikāri kalidēva nāyaka
ra permmeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . vri . suragajadaṁte dāni surarājatanūbhavanante śauryyanuddhura surarājanaṁte vibdhāśrayanudgasurādriyaṁte susthiranasurāriyaṁte la
kṣmīdharaneṁdu samantu kūrttu bittaradoḷe baṇnikuṁ vibdhamaṁḍaḷi perggaḍe kalla mayyanaṁ . satyaparanakhiḻa janasaṁstutyanumēśāṁghri kamaḻavinamadbhṛṁgaṁ
nijagōtrābjāditya tānanipanalte sale kalidēvaṁ . Intaṁ negaḷtagaṁ pogaḷtagamāvāsamāda pannāyadadhikāri kalidēvanāyakaṁ śrī mūlasthānadēvara khaṁḍa
sphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakkeṁdalliyācāryyarggaṁgēśvarapaṇḍitare kālaṁ karcci dhārā pūrvvakaṁ māḍiyā dēvara tōṁṭadelege paṁnāyada suṁkamaṁ sarvvanamasyamuṁ .
sarvvabādhāparihāravāgi biṭṭaru © .
Digital edition of SII 15.36 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
